title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: Claude Design is an AI design tool from Anthropic that automates parts of the design workflow by generating branded landing pages and design assets from a design system. The tutorial covers a 4-step framework including design system setup, generation, markup edits, and template deployment.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master walks through Claude Design, an Anthropic tool that generates branded landing pages and design assets from a defined design system. It lays out a four-step framework: design system setup, generation, markup edits, and template deployment. The value lies in showing how the tool automates parts of the design workflow rather than producing assets from scratch each time. Key takeaways center on grounding output in a design system and moving generated work through edits to deployable templates.
